title: [WWYD] WHY WON'T YOU DIE?
description: This mod removes taking damage from the game.
body:
WHY WON'T YOU DIE??

Nanomachines son.

- Me

 

Welcome to WWYD, this mod removes this very annoying bug called "taking damage" from the game, you will still feel the damage or any entity will for that matter they'll just not loose any health like at all in any way shape or form.

To enable the mod simply set the gamerule "doHealthLoss" to false and you're golden.

FAQ:

1. Why you would want this?

 - well uhhhhh....

   maybe you'd want to save your dog from lava with an admin command....?

   uhhh... next question please

Supported Versions:

1.7.10: N/A: None

1.12.2: N/A: None

1.14.4: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.15.2: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.16.5: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.17.1: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.18.2: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.19.2: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.19.4: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.20.1: LTS: "Long Term Support"

1.20.4: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.20.6: PAI: "Provided As Is"

1.21.1: LTS: "Long Term Support"

 

Good Luck ;D

Sadly made by: mc_jojo3
